title: The Problem Solvers | Michael Truell at Cursor
summary: Cursor is an AI-native coding platform that uses agents to help engineers and less-technical builders ship quality code without barriers. Founded by Michael Truell, it has grown from 15 people two years ago to 700 employees and serves over 60% of Fortune 500 companies, partnering closely with Anthropic's Claude.
writeup: This Claude channel video profiles Cursor and its founder Michael Truell, framing it as an AI-native coding platform where agents help engineers and less-technical builders ship quality code without barriers. It documents the company's growth from 15 people two years ago to 700 employees and reports that Cursor serves over 60% of Fortune 500 companies. The profile also notes a close partnership with Anthropic's Claude.
